text.title: rag-pipeline-design Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for rag-pipeline-design as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using HyDE for all queries regardless of vocabulary gap.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: HyDE adds an LLM call per query. For simple, direct queries where vocabulary matches, HyDE provides no recall improvement and adds latency and cost unnecessarily.

failure-mode.description: Injecting retrieved context verbatim without length limits into the LLM prompt.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Long chunks eat context budget fast. 5 chunks of 1000 tokens each plus system prompt may consume 80% of a 8K context model. Compress or truncate retrieved passages before injection; prioritize by reranking score.
